message:
feat(emulators): Add command emulator system for sandboxed execution

Implement Zig-based command emulators that intercept spawn calls and
return deterministic mock output without executing real commands.

New files:
- src/component/emulators/mod.zig: Emulator registry and dispatcher
- src/component/emulators/git_emulator.zig: Git command mocking
- src/component/emulators/gh_emulator.zig: GitHub CLI mocking
- src/shell_parser.zig: Shell AST tokenizer for security analysis

Features:
- Git emulator: status, branch, log, remote, rev-parse, diff, config
- GitHub CLI emulator: pr, issue, repo, auth status, api endpoints
- Multi-output mode support (server/browser/viewkit)
- Security: blocks auth login/logout, no credential exposure
- Shell parser: quote handling, redirect detection, pipe parsing

Integration:
- Emulator dispatch in spawnStart() after security checks
- Config via .edgebox.json commands.*.emulator field
- Falls through to real execution if emulator returns null

Tests: 30 emulator tests + 40 shell parser tests + 18 security tests
